chapter_title.ar: بَابُ مَنْ أَطَاعَ الْمَخْلُوقَ فِي مَعْصِيَةِ الْخَالِقِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 161 – The one who obeys the creatures (people) regarding a disobedience to the Creator

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (1/69)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (1/69)
text: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) مَنْ أَرْضَى سُلْطَاناً بِسَخَطِ اللَّهِ خَرَجَ مِنْ دِينِ اللَّهِ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Al Nowfaly, from Al Sakuny,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup>, from his<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup> father<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup>, from Jabir Bin Abdullah Al-Ansary who said, ‘Rasool-Allah<sup style="font-weight: normal">saww</sup> said: ‘The one who pleases a ruling authority by Angering Allah<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup>, would exit from the Religion of Allah<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup>’.
en.sarwar: 5. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from al-Nawfali from al-Sakuni from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) from his father from Jabir ibn ‘Abd Allah (al-Ansari) who has said the following: “The Messenger of Allah has said, ‘Whoever seeks the pleasure of a king by a means that anger Allah, has moved out of the religion of Allah.’”
